ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each city (IATA code) */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country */,
  "iso_numeric" INTEGER /* ISO 3166-1 numeric code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code of the country */,
  "phone_code" TEXT /* International phone code of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "city_id" TEXT /* Reference to the city where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the airport (Place ID) */,
  "skyscanner_code" TEXT /* Skyscanner code of the airport */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the airport (e.g., Station, Hub) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset of the airport timezone */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  "passenger_volume" INTEGER /* Annual passenger volume of the airport */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the airport data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., travel_agent, airline_staff, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_logs" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Time when the search was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the search was performed */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., airport, city, route) */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the search log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search event */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport in the search result */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the airport in the search results */,
  "score" REAL /* Relevance score of the search result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the search result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES search_logs ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the favorite */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport added to favorites */,
  "city_id" TEXT /* ID of the city added to favorites */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the favorite was added */,
  "favorite_type" TEXT /* Type of favorite (airport, city, route) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the favorite entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_reviews_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
